news.title:
ED files prosecution complaint against Anil Nutrients Ltd in ₹47.88 cr bank fraud case.
Fraud involves Bank of India, director Amol Shripal Sheth, and six others.
news.summary:
ED files prosecution complaint against Anil Nutrients Ltd in ₹47.88 cr bank fraud case.
Fraud involves Bank of India, director Amol Shripal Sheth, and six others.

news.title:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.
news.summary:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.

news.title:
Bank of India MD notes CASA decline due to structural shifts, with customers investing in equities, funds, and gold.
AI in banking aids fraud detection, cybersecurity, and hyper-personalization, enhancing efficiency and risk management.
news.summary:
Bank of India MD notes CASA decline due to structural shifts, with customers investing in equities, funds, and gold.
AI in banking aids fraud detection, cybersecurity, and hyper-personalization, enhancing efficiency and risk management.

news.title:
Bank of India schedules bond interest payments for April 2 due to a bank holiday.
Coupon rates for Tier I & II bonds range from 7.1% to 8.6%.
news.summary:
Bank of India schedules bond interest payments for April 2 due to a bank holiday.
Coupon rates for Tier I & II bonds range from 7.1% to 8.6%.

news.title:
Bank Of India gets 'BBB-' rating confirmation from Fitch.
Its viability rating is upgraded to 'BB' by Fitch.
news.summary:
Bank Of India gets 'BBB-' rating confirmation from Fitch.
Its viability rating is upgraded to 'BB' by Fitch.

news.title:
Supreme Court backs Bank of India in ₹1,500 crore loan default case.
Court clarifies guidelines on classifying bank fraud.
news.summary:
Supreme Court backs Bank of India in ₹1,500 crore loan default case.
Court clarifies guidelines on classifying bank fraud.

news.title:
Bank of India to exercise call option on 9.3% Additional Tier I Bonds Series VII.
Record date set for 13th March 2026; bonds issued in March 2021 with a 5-year tenor.
news.summary:
Bank of India to exercise call option on 9.3% Additional Tier I Bonds Series VII.
Record date set for 13th March 2026; bonds issued in March 2021 with a 5-year tenor.

news.title:
RBI's revised guidelines on acquisition financing enable Indian banks like SBI, Bank of India, and Kotak Mahindra Bank to participate in M&A, refinancing, and stake hikes with eased equity requirements.
The new norms allow unlisted firms with Rs 500 crore net worth and 3-year profitability to access financing, boosting domestic consolidation and capex in sectors like manufacturing and healthcare.
news.summary:
RBI's revised guidelines on acquisition financing enable Indian banks like SBI, Bank of India, and Kotak Mahindra Bank to participate in M&A, refinancing, and stake hikes with eased equity requirements.
The new norms allow unlisted firms with Rs 500 crore net worth and 3-year profitability to access financing, boosting domestic consolidation and capex in sectors like manufacturing and healthcare.

news.title:
ED attaches ₹1.03-cr assets of suspended BOI officer Hitesh Singla in ₹16.8-cr scam.
Singla allegedly siphoned ₹16.8 cr from 230 customer accounts over two years under PMLA.
news.summary:
ED attaches ₹1.03-cr assets of suspended BOI officer Hitesh Singla in ₹16.8-cr scam.
Singla allegedly siphoned ₹16.8 cr from 230 customer accounts over two years under PMLA.

news.title:
India Ratings reaffirmed Bank of India's Tier II and infra bond ratings at IND AA/Stable.
Issuer rating and AT1 bonds withdrawn; reflects systemic importance, better capital, and govt support.
news.summary:
India Ratings reaffirmed Bank of India's Tier II and infra bond ratings at IND AA/Stable.
Issuer rating and AT1 bonds withdrawn; reflects systemic importance, better capital, and govt support.

news.title:
Nifty fell 2.96% to 24,571.75, Sensex dropped 2.88% to 79,899.42 due to STT hike, modest capex, and no major defense announcements.
PSU banks like Bank of India and BoB declined; metals saw volatility, with silver down 9% and gold futures down 3%.
news.summary:
Nifty fell 2.96% to 24,571.75, Sensex dropped 2.88% to 79,899.42 due to STT hike, modest capex, and no major defense announcements.
PSU banks like Bank of India and BoB declined; metals saw volatility, with silver down 9% and gold futures down 3%.

news.title:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.
news.summary:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.

news.title:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.
news.summary:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.

news.title:
Union Bank of India and Bank of India may merge by year-end, creating the second-largest PSU bank with assets of ₹25.4 lakh crore in FY25.
The merged entity would rank sixth in market cap at ₹2.13 lakh crore, surpassing Canara Bank and PNB, but faces tech integration challenges.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India and Bank of India may merge by year-end, creating the second-largest PSU bank with assets of ₹25.4 lakh crore in FY25.
The merged entity would rank sixth in market cap at ₹2.13 lakh crore, surpassing Canara Bank and PNB, but faces tech integration challenges.

news.title:
Bank of India redeemed ₹750 crore Additional Tier I Bonds Series VI on call date.
Redemption included ₹56.1 crore interest; no outstanding amount remains.
news.summary:
Bank of India redeemed ₹750 crore Additional Tier I Bonds Series VI on call date.
Redemption included ₹56.1 crore interest; no outstanding amount remains.

news.title:
Bank of India reported 13.6% YoY growth in global advances to ₹7.4 lakh crore.
Net profit rose 7% YoY to ₹2,705 crore in Q3 FY26; GNPA reduced to 2.3%.
news.summary:
Bank of India reported 13.6% YoY growth in global advances to ₹7.4 lakh crore.
Net profit rose 7% YoY to ₹2,705 crore in Q3 FY26; GNPA reduced to 2.3%.

news.title:
Bank of India appoints Smt. Usha Ramsinghani as Company Secretary, replacing Shri Rajesh V. Upadhya.
Ramsinghani, a Science graduate, CAIIB, and Chartered Accountant, has 13+ years of experience.
news.summary:
Bank of India appoints Smt. Usha Ramsinghani as Company Secretary, replacing Shri Rajesh V. Upadhya.
Ramsinghani, a Science graduate, CAIIB, and Chartered Accountant, has 13+ years of experience.

news.title:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.
news.summary:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.

news.title:
Bank of India shares surged 7% to a 52-week high on strong Q3 results.
The stock rose 6.9% to Rs 168.4 on the NSE after 7% net profit growth.
news.summary:
Bank of India shares surged 7% to a 52-week high on strong Q3 results.
The stock rose 6.9% to Rs 168.4 on the NSE after 7% net profit growth.

news.title:
Bank of India reports a 16 bps increase in margins, surprising analysts.
The company believes this margin growth is sustainable, boosting confidence.
news.summary:
Bank of India reports a 16 bps increase in margins, surprising analysts.
The company believes this margin growth is sustainable, boosting confidence.
